steps.title: Define a useful proxy
steps.content: The hypothesis depends on A. aquaticus serving as a reliable proxy for P. perezi. That requires WC-NP uptake in the invertebrate to predict uptake in the vertebrate.

steps.title: Break the proxy link
steps.content: The matching finding weakens the hypothesis because different, poorly understood uptake rates would make the proxy unreliable. Choice A suggests less harmful testing, Choice C concerns other nanoparticles, and Choice D shows consistency that would support proxy use. The answer is B.
